raw_title: Amazon is rolling out a redesigned Fire TV app
raw_content: With the updated Fire TV app, users can browse and discover content directly from their phone, manage their watchlist on the go, and play titles on their TV from the mobile app.
generated_title: 亚马逊推出重新设计的Fire TV应用
generated_summary: 用户可从手机浏览内容、管理观看列表，并将节目投射至电视。
